data.text/markdown:
US GEOGRAPHY REFERENCE BUILDER

Purpose

Build a canonical U.S. geographic reference table using official Census geography files and extend it with Connecticut planning regions introduced in 2024.

Why this exists

The 2020 Census county file does NOT include the new Connecticut planning regions that replaced counties beginning in 2024. This script:
  1. Downloads official Census reference files
  2. Preserves raw files for auditability
  3. Builds a Census-style combined file
  4. Creates a simplified BI-friendly geography table

Data Sources

U.S. Census Bureau reference files States https://www2.census.gov/geo/docs/reference/codes2020/national_state2020.txt Counties https://www2.census.gov/geo/docs/reference/codes2020/national_county2020.txt

Outputs

data/raw/ original source files data/processed/ output files

console.name: stdout
console.text:
Downloading national_state2020.txt
Downloading national_county2020.txt
Standard Census-style TXT table created: data\processed\census_county_equivalent_reference.txt
Standard Census-style CSV table created: data\processed\census_county_equivalent_reference.csv
Curated BI-friendly CSV table created: data\processed\us_geography_reference.csv
Curated BI-friendly TXT table created: data\processed\us_geography_reference.txt
